boundaries.title_guess: East Anglia: Fakenham, Little Snoring, Ely

evidence.excerpt: April 30th. After Charles' cricket practice we left for Fakenham at 6.10.
We found a campsite at 3 miles N.W of Littleport, Hale Ten, Cave farm

boundaries.mixed_detail: Page opens with the END of the previous (Hove/Leonardslee, April 12th) trip — 'We set off through more showers for Birmingham' — then the new East Anglia trip starts at the 'April 30th' heading later on the same page.

boundaries.title_guess: Wales: Malvern concert, Dinas, Port Maddock, Portmeirion

evidence.excerpt: Fri May 28th 9.20pm Simon & John set off for Malvern ... 4.45 All of us set off for [?Dinas].
we left to put Thomas on the train at Llanbdr ... collected circular slate from the slate factory at Port Maddock

boundaries.title_guess: Cambridge: David & Debbie Ford, St John's

evidence.excerpt: Saturday June 26th. Simon, Eve & Charles set off for Cambridge at 10.30 ... arrived on David & Debbie Ford's drive.
we called on Richard Holroyd ... before going home

boundaries.mixed_detail: Page opens with the end of the Wales trip (took the tent down, stopped at Burger King outside Shrewsbury) then the Cambridge trip starts at 'Saturday June 26th'.

boundaries.title_guess: Scotland: Glasgow, Mull, Iona, Trossachs, St Andrews, Edinburgh

evidence.excerpt: Sat 31st July. We set off at 4 pm, S, E, W, P, J, C ... We motored up to Orton near the Lake District
Sat Aug 14th ... got home about 8.45. Then we all went out for a balti.

boundaries.title_guess: Stapeley Water Gardens; then London (move Thomas to Mountview Rd)

evidence.excerpt: Sunday 22nd August. After church we went to Stapeley Water Gardens with Jim, Margaret & Helen
Friday 3rd Sept. Simon, Thomas & Eve set off early for London ... We moved Thomas into 32 Mountview Rd, N4.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Page holds two short outings: the Sunday 22nd Aug Stapeley day-trip and a separate Friday 3rd Sept London trip. Index entry p22 'Stapeley water gardens / London' appears to fold both together; break falls at the 'Friday 3rd Sept' heading.

evidence.excerpt: Saturday October 9th. Simon & Eve drove across to Ely Station to pick up Thomas for Robert Upex's 50 birthday party at Chippenham.
we took Thomas to the station & went home.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Page opens with the end of the Sept London/Mountview trip ('hurrying back to Birmingham') then the Oct 9th Ely/Chippenham trip starts.

boundaries.title_guess: Bath: Roman Baths, American Museum, Limpley Stoke

evidence.excerpt: May 5th 2000 Friday. 6.35pm Simon, Eve, John 12, Charles 11 left 86 for Bath ... Bath Marina Park
We had tea in the carpark & left for home, dropping off John at Malvern on the way
Friday May 26th. Simon & Eve, John & Charles drove down to the Malvern summer concert ... We slept outside No 7.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Page opens with the end of the Bath trip ('left for home, dropping off John at Malvern') then the Malvern concert weekend starts at 'Friday May 26th'.

evidence.excerpt: On Sunday at 3.10. we left for the Cotswolds. We have come to Enslow, 4 miles from Woodstock.
After returning to the van, David made tea for all of us + then we set off home

boundaries.mixed_detail: Page opens with the tail of the Malvern concert weekend ('we brought William + Peter home. Saturday we spent at home') then the Cotswolds/Enslow trip starts at 'On Sunday at 3.10 we left for the Cotswolds'.

evidence.excerpt: Saturday July 1st. We left home, S, E, J, C, & breakfasted in a lay by. We reached Hay-on-Wye

boundaries.title_guess: Peak District: Lathkill Gorge, Over Haddon, Ashbourne

evidence.excerpt: September 22nd. There has [been] a huge gap because we hired an RV in California for a month ... Charles, Simon & Eve, + Tonic are going
up to the Peak District through dense traffic ... We arrived at Hadon Grove

boundaries.mixed_detail: Page opens with end of the Hay-on-Wye trip (Capel-y-ffin asterisk continuation, 'Then we went home') then a months-long gap (California RV) and the Sept 22nd Peak District trip starts.

boundaries.title_guess: Hendon RAF Museum & London (Courtauld, Science Museum, Tate Modern, Globe)

evidence.excerpt: Sat October 20th. We left home at 9.50. & drove to Coleshill & bought a Brompton folding bike. Then we had lunch in the carpark at the Hendon RAF museum.
Tuesday We reached the Tate Modern at 11.15

boundaries.mixed_detail: Page opens with end of the Peak District trip ('Sunday Sept 24th ... set off to reach home for lunch') then the Oct 20th RAF/London trip starts.

boundaries.title_guess: Bath: Bristol cycle path, Herschel Museum, Bath Abbey

evidence.excerpt: Friday 4th May. 2001 5.15. Simon, Charles, Eve + Tonic left with our 3 bikes ... for Bath; we want to go on the Bath/Bristol cycle path.
Monday May 7th ... After elevenses we left for home.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Page opens with the close of the Oct 2000 London trip (Picketts Lock; 'I now have a portable CD player') then the May 2001 Bath cycling trip starts at 'Friday 4th May. 2001'.

evidence.excerpt: Friday May 25th. Peter is 18 today! ... Simon, Eve & Charles [?Tonic] set off for [?Malvern] at 4.45 ... We camped outside No 7.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Page opens with the end of the Bath trip ('After elevenses we left for home') then the Malvern concert weekend starts at 'Friday May 25th'.

boundaries.title_guess: Cambridge & the Fens: punting, Burwell, Wicken Fen

evidence.excerpt: Sunday We left breakfastless at 6.35 am ... We dropped them off at the airport at 7.05
We reached Cambridge at 10.15, & met Richard Holroyd at William's room ... we got on a punt at St. John's
Monday 28th May ... He went to Wicken Fen ... Burwell Church is magnificent

boundaries.mixed_detail: Page opens with the end of the Malvern concert weekend (drove home with Chris Lowe, water-pistol fight, barbeque at home) then a new Cambridge/Fens trip starts at 'Sunday We left breakfastless at 6.35 am' (airport drop-off then Cambridge).

open_at_end: The Cambridge/Fens trip starting A_0293_L is still in progress at the window edge (Wicken Fen / Burwell, Mon 28th May 2001) and likely continues into the next window.
notes: Window covers spreads A_0265-A_0294 (book metadata gives books[].start A_0256/end A_0350, but transcribed spreads in this bundle begin at A_0265). Content spans 1999-04 to 2001-05 and corresponds to index book4 entries roughly p6-p37. The window opens mid-trip: A_0265_L begins with the END of the 1999 Hove/Leonardslee (Brighton/Bramber) trip that started in the previous window. Many one-line photo/sketch-only right-hand pages (e.g. A_0267_L Brighton Pier, A_0278_R Scotland route map, A_0283_R/A_0284_L Llanthony/Skenfrith sketches, A_0294_R Wicken Fen) belong to the surrounding trip. Several short weekend outings share index lines and are reported as separate boundaries with lower confidence where the home-return between them is implicit rather than explicit.
